'''Gumbaeki''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] chieftain, Master of the [[Claatuvac Guild/Legends|Claatuvac Guild]], and the leader of [[Palsaang/Legends|Palsaang]], a small village on the outskirts of the [[Wawaatt Archipelago/Legends|Wawaatt Archipelago]].

==Biography==
During the [[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|Battle of Kashyyyk]], Gumbaeki's village was attacked by [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] slavers and most of its inhabitants were taken prisoner. To get them back, Gumbaeki enlisted the help of the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] and [[Luminara Unduli/Legends|Luminara Unduli]], along with several of their [[Clone trooper/Legends|clones]]. The ensuing raid was a success thanks to the timely arrival of [[Vilmarh Grahrk]], whom had been smuggling goods onto [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] on the behalf of the Wookiees.

His fate after the battle is unknown, although Vos believed he would possibly evacuate his tribe into caves to avoid [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] and their Trandoshan allies.
